codeReview.summary: The worker successfully completed the integration verification task. The only required code change was a fix to Prisma's seed configuration in apps/api/prisma.config.ts for Prisma 7 compatibility, which was implemented correctly.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker used 'tsx prisma/seed.ts' as the seed command in prisma.config.ts, which resolves the integration issue described in the task prompt.

summary: Code review passed. The implementation consists of a single bug fix to prisma.config.ts to support Prisma 7 seeding. The worker effectively validated the cross-area integration as requested.
